WSO RESCUED + TRUMP 48-HR REISSUED + KUWAIT INFRA + BAHRAIN OIL + HOUTHI BEN GURION: US special forces rescued F-15E WSO inside Iran. 2 C-130s + 2 Little Birds destroyed. Trump 48-hr: all Hell Monday 8PM ET. Kuwait 2 power/water plants (2 units shut) + Shuwaikh oil fire + Ministries. Bahrain BAPCO fire + Gulf Petrochemical. UAE 9+1+50 (cumul 507/24/2,191). Borouge fire. Houthis cluster Ben Gurion. Russia 200 more Bushehr (363+). China 5-point. Brent ~$109 (DOWN from $115). Internet 864+.

sitrep: WSO RESCUED: US special forces rescued F-15E WSO after 36+ hrs evasion. 2 MC-130Js + 2 MH-6/AH-6 Little Birds destroyed (self-destruction). CIA deception campaign. WSO in Kuwait. Trump: most daring rescue. Iran claims 5 killed.
TRUMP 48-HR REISSUED: All Hell if Hormuz not opened Monday 8PM ET. 3rd ultimatum (D22, Mar 23, Apr 5). April 6 = TOMORROW.
KUWAIT INFRASTRUCTURE: 2 power/water desalination plants - 2 units shut. Shuwaikh Oil Complex fire (evacuated). Ministries Complex. No casualties. Most significant Kuwait targeting since D1.
BAHRAIN OIL: BAPCO oil tank fire + Gulf Petrochemical units attacked. Fires across units.
UAE: 9 BALLISTIC + 1 CRUISE + 50 DRONES: Cumul 507/24/2,191. Borouge Petrochemicals fire.
HOUTHIS CLUSTER MISSILE BEN GURION: 3rd front active since D29.
C-130s + LITTLE BIRDS DESTROYED: Iranian footage. US self-destruction confirmed. Total: 7 manned + 2 C-130s + 2 helicopters.
RUSSIA 200 MORE BUSHEHR: 363+ total. Araghchi: contamination risk.
CHINA DIPLOMACY: 5-point with Pakistan. Iran FM: trust zero.
CASUALTIES: HRANA 3,531+. AJ 2,076+. Iran 5 killed rescue. Lebanese 1,368+. US 15 KIA (WSO rescued) + 520+. 7+2+2.
APRIL 6 = TOMORROW: 48-hr Monday 8PM ET. WSO rescue removes POW but Trump committed. Kuwait = Iran escalating. Power grid MOST LIKELY.

dailyRows.primary: All-theater: UAE (Al Dhafra, Dubai airport, Palm Jumeirah), Israel (Tel Aviv, Haifa), Saudi (Ras Tanura), Qatar (Al Udeid), Kuwait, Bahrain, Jordan
dailyRows.capability: Operation Roaring Lion / True Promise IV launched within hours. 480 ballistic missiles + 720 drones on D1. Fastest Iranian response ever — suggests pre-positioned C2.
dailyRows.cost: Khamenei killed. IRIS Dena sunk by US submarine off Sri Lanka. Brent $72 (+$7). Hormuz shipping halted immediately — 150 ships stalled.
dailyRows.assessment: Overwhelming opening salvo. Iran distributing fire across 13 countries to overwhelm defenses.

dailyRows.primary: Peak launch day. UAE heaviest target. Israel: 124 injured from 10-warhead ballistic missile at Tel Aviv.
dailyRows.capability: 520 missiles + 850 drones — highest single-day volume. Iran expending stockpile rapidly.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $79.45 (CNBC). Iran state media confirms Khamenei family killed. Assembly of Experts emergency session. Jebel Ali Port fire, AWS data center hit.
dailyRows.assessment: Peak fury. Iran burning through inventory at unsustainable rate.

dailyRows.primary: Kuwait (6 US KIA at Shuaiba Port operations center), Bahrain, Saudi (US Embassy Riyadh drones), Israel (Hezbollah joins)
dailyRows.capability: 400+530. Kuwaiti F/A-18 friendly-fire shoots down 3 US F-15Es (all 6 crew survive). Hezbollah opens second front.
dailyRows.cost: 6 US KIA — first American combat deaths. Brent ~$83. Qatar arrests 10 IRGC cell operatives.
dailyRows.assessment: War expands. US casualties mount. Hezbollah + Iraqi militias = multi-front.

dailyRows.primary: Nuclear sites: Natanz entrance destroyed, Isfahan, Fordow access roads hit, Arak targeted
dailyRows.capability: 350+480. Declining from peak but still massive. Coalition strikes nuclear infrastructure.
dailyRows.cost: IAEA confirms Natanz inaccessible. Enrichment stockpile unverified 8+ months. Humanitarian crisis emerging.
dailyRows.assessment: Nuclear dimension activated. Escalation risk from enrichment uncertainty.

dailyRows.primary: Hezbollah long-range missile at Tel Aviv. Israel 250+ strikes on Lebanon. IRIS Dena confirmed sunk.
dailyRows.capability: 250+350. Clear decline. Senate rejects war powers resolution. CSIS: first 100 hours = $3.7B.
dailyRows.cost: Lebanon front fully active. Brent ~$90. Senate gives Trump political cover.
dailyRows.assessment: Decline accelerating. Political constraints loosening domestically.

dailyRows.primary: Qatar (14 ballistic + 4 drones per MoD), Kuwait, Bahrain, UAE
dailyRows.capability: 150+220. Fars claims >500 missiles, ~2,000 drones cumul. Rate down 69% missiles, 74% drones.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$92. IEA triggers largest coordinated SPR release in history (400M bbl). War cost ~$2B/day.
dailyRows.assessment: Iran's ballistic capability declining structurally. Economic war intensifying.

dailyRows.primary: Continued Gulf + Israel harassment. Iraq: PMF HQs struck across multiple provinces.
dailyRows.capability: 100+160. Rate down 79% missiles. >60% of Iranian launchers neutralized. 43 naval vessels destroyed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $92.69 (CNBC). VLCC freight rates approaching records. Ruwais refinery shut (922K bbl/day offline).
dailyRows.assessment: Iran losing conventional capability. Asymmetric phase beginning.

dailyRows.primary: Diminished volume across Gulf. Iraq militia attacks intensify. F-35 shoots down Iranian Yak-130 — first F-35 air-to-air kill.
dailyRows.capability: 70+110. Rate down 85%. Red Crescent: 65 schools, 32 medical facilities damaged.
dailyRows.cost: Brent intraday volatility. IEA Oil Market Report: 'largest supply disruption in history.' 20 Mb/d offline. Iran internet blackout persists.
dailyRows.assessment: Conventional campaign near-spent. Iran shifting to economic leverage.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD cumul: 1,422 UAVs detected (1,342 intercepted). All 8 cruise missiles intercepted.
dailyRows.capability: 50+80. Rate down 90%. UAE air defenses showing strain but holding.
dailyRows.cost: Brent hits $119.50 — 52-week high (Investing.com). IEA: 'within whisker of $120.' Then crashes on SPR release news. Extreme volatility.
dailyRows.assessment: Oil price spike signals market panic. SPR intervention buys temporary relief.

dailyRows.primary: Mojtaba Khamenei designated new Supreme Leader by Assembly of Experts. NATO intercepts 2nd missile over Turkey.
dailyRows.capability: 40+60. Rate down 92%. Trump claims war 'very complete, pretty much.' Then backtracks.
dailyRows.cost: Brent crashes to $88.43 (CNBC) — post-SPR selloff. EIA settles $94. Turkey deploys F-16s to N. Cyprus. 10,000+ civilian sites damaged in Iran.
dailyRows.assessment: Political transition in Iran. Conventional capability near-exhausted but regime intact.

dailyRows.primary: UAE reports continued intercepts. Gulf state coordination improving. Iraq: 300+ militia attacks cumul since D1.
dailyRows.capability: 27+81 (scaled from UAE MoD). Missile launches at lowest sustained level. Drones maintaining higher volume — cheaper, harder to suppress.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$91. Trump signals drawdown but Pentagon contradicts. Mixed messages on endgame.
dailyRows.assessment: Drone-missile divergence: missiles near-depleted but drone harassment continues at meaningful level.

dailyRows.primary: UAE MoD: 13 missiles (6 ballistic + 7 cruise) + 39 drones intercepted (official). Bahrain airport drones + fuel tanks fire. Ship hit in Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: UAE cumul: 268 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,514 UAVs. Fortune: Brent $90.96 AM. Drone attacks on airports emerging as pattern.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $91.98 close (CNBC). UKMTO: 16+ ships attacked cumul. Container ship fire in Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: Low-volume but high-disruption attacks on civilian infrastructure.

dailyRows.primary: Bahrain airport hit. Kuwait airport targeted. Dubai explosions. Abu Dhabi old airport fire. Container ship attacked near Jebel Ali.
dailyRows.capability: 8+40. KC-135 Stratotanker crashes western Iraq — 6 US KIA (total now 13). 4th US aircraft lost. Iran militias claim credit.
dailyRows.cost: Brent first >$100 close: $100.46 (CNBC). Fortune AM: $99.84. French CWO Frion killed near Erbil — first non-US allied death.
dailyRows.assessment: US losses mounting. Oil breaking $100 sustainably. French casualty internationalizes war.

dailyRows.primary: New Supreme Leader Khamenei first statement (written only — no video). Vows Hormuz stays closed. 3 more ships struck. Kuwait power lines hit by debris.
dailyRows.capability: 10+30. CENTCOM: 6,000+ US targets struck. 90+ Iranian vessels destroyed. Ballistic down 86% from D1. UNSC Res 2817 condemns Iran 13-0-2.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $99.32 (CNBC). Khamenei statement fuels speculation on injuries. $10M bounty on Khamenei. State Dept: 'likely disfigured.'
dailyRows.assessment: Khamenei's absence and written-only statement suggests serious injuries. IRGC operating autonomously.

dailyRows.primary: UAE 9 ballistic + 33 drones intercepted (AJ). Qatar 4 ballistic + drones. Saudi 51 drones — LARGEST single-day barrage targeting kingdom. Kuwait airport drones. Jordan: 79/85 intercepted over week 2.
dailyRows.capability: 20+70. DRONE VOLUME TICKED UP — Saudi's 51-drone barrage a significant escalation. Kharg Island: 90+ military targets struck by CENTCOM (sparing oil). White House: ballistic down 90%, drones down 95%, 65+ vessels sunk.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $103.14 Fri close (CNBC). Fujairah oil hub fire from drone debris. IRGC declares UAE bases 'legitimate targets.' Trump 'not ready for deal.' May hit Kharg 'a few more times just for fun.'
dailyRows.assessment: Drone escalation despite missile depletion. Saudi barrage = Iran still has UAV stockpile. Kharg strike shows coalition restraint on oil — but for how long?

dailyRows.primary: Heaviest single-night bombardment since D1: Isfahan, Shiraz (20+ explosions), Tehran, Dezful, Khomein, Hamedan, Jask port. 6+ provinces. 10+ hypersonic missiles at Israel.
dailyRows.capability: 25+60. IRGC fires 10+ HYPERSONIC missiles at Israel — capability escalation. Israel critically low on ballistic interceptors (Semafor). IDF: 7,600+ strikes in Iran, 1,100+ in Lebanon cumul.
dailyRows.cost: 15+ killed Isfahan. Shiraz residential areas hit. 10,000+ homes destroyed (Tehran governor). 56 cultural sites damaged. Pope calls ceasefire. Pahlavi outlines transition. Houthis threaten Red Sea resumption.
dailyRows.assessment: Hypersonic escalation + interceptor crisis = war's most dangerous moment since D1. Houthi threat = potential second maritime chokepoint.

dailyRows.primary: Israel new Tehran strikes (smoke over capital). Dubai airport drone fire (flights suspended). Abu Dhabi missile kill. Fujairah drone fire. Saudi 37 drones intercepted (AJ). Baghdad airport rockets. Israel: 245 attack waves total.
dailyRows.capability: DRONE VOLUME SURGED — Saudi 37 drones alone is highest single-day count from kingdom. IRGC claims most weapons cache intact and hasn't used post-2025 missiles yet. If true, Iran's offensive depth is much greater than down 90% suggests. Israel planning 3+ more weeks of strikes.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106+. Gulf exports down 61% (Reuters/Kpler). US wounded revised to ~200. Hormuz coalition failing — Australia, Japan, Germany all declined. G5 'gravely concerned' re Lebanon. Trump threatens NATO umbrella + Xi summit.
dailyRows.assessment: IRGC 'arsenal intact' claim is the most significant D17 development. If true, Iran has been deliberately rationing — using old stock while preserving modern missiles. This reframes the entire attrition narrative. War may have much longer tail than assumed.

dailyRows.primary: DECAPITATION: Larijani + Soleimani confirmed killed. UAE full airspace closure. Qatar 13/14 ballistic intercepted. Saudi 12+ drones. Baghdad Al-Rasheed Hotel + embassy targeted. Abu Dhabi 1 killed. Tanker struck off Fujairah. Israel ground invasion of Lebanon.
dailyRows.capability: Decapitation accelerating but Qatar 13/14 ballistic missiles = Iran still has meaningful ballistic capability. IRGC 'cache intact' claim from D16 gaining credibility. Israel ground ops in Lebanon = second full front.
dailyRows.cost: Joe Kent (NCTC director) resigned — 'Iran not a threat.' Trump: don't need NATO. Delayed China trip 1 month. France: 'never' Hormuz during war. Amnesty: 170+ schoolgirls killed in US strike.
dailyRows.assessment: Crosscurrents: Military decapitation vs economic leverage. Israel destroying command structure but Iran's remaining capability + Hormuz control = strategic stalemate. First tanker transit could signal beginning of negotiated passage framework.

dailyRows.primary: ENERGY + NUCLEAR WAR: Israel struck South Pars (AM). Iran hit Ras Laffan LNG TWICE (PM). Bushehr NPP 'hostile projectile' (IAEA: no reactor damage, Rosatom suspended construction). 5th senior kill (Basij head + Khatib). Kuwait 4 ballistic + 20 drones. Multi-warhead at Israel (2 killed). Saudi 4 ballistic at Riyadh DURING FM meeting + drone at gas facility.
dailyRows.capability: ENERGY WAR FULLY MUTUAL + NUCLEAR DIMENSION. Ras Laffan x2, South Pars, Bushehr NPP all hit in single day. Iran named specific Gulf targets (Samref, Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn). Multi-warhead Khorramshahr-4 + Qadr. Israel striking northern Iran.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $107.38 close (CNBC), spiked $111+ after-hours. Gas $3.84 (+29%). Fed held rates. Pentagon $200B+. Qatar expelled attaches. Saudi: 'right to military action.' 12 FM joint statement. E3 backing military defense. Hengaw: 5,300 dead. Lebanon 880+. Kataib Hezbollah conditional pause. IMO emergency meeting.
dailyRows.assessment: INFLECTION: Energy + nuclear. Bushehr projectile = nuclear-adjacent escalation. Ras Laffan x2 = Qatar's LNG industry threatened. E3 military backing + 12 FM statement + Saudi warning = diplomatic momentum toward intervention OR escalation.

dailyRows.primary: SAMREF HIT + ENERGY WAR CONTINUES: Kuwait TWO refineries ablaze (Mina al-Ahmadi + Mina Abdullah). QatarEnergy: 'several' LNG facilities. SAMREF refinery (Yanbu, Red Sea) hit by drone — IRGC named target EXECUTED. 6th salvo at Israel. Kuwait 4 ballistic + 25+ drones. Saudi Al-Kharj 2 killed.
dailyRows.capability: D20 REVISED: 45 missiles + 80 drones. SAMREF = FIRST Red Sea coast target. IRGC executing named target list: Kuwait, Qatar, SAMREF. Remaining: Jubail, Mesaieed, Al Hosn.
dailyRows.cost: Brent surged $119.11 intraday (CNBC), settled ~$114 close. Citi: $120+. SAMREF 'impact minimal' per Aramco but symbolic significance enormous — Red Sea coast reached.
dailyRows.assessment: SAMREF is the inflection within the inflection. IRGC's named targets systematically executed. Red Sea coast = drones reach Saudi western export infrastructure. Pipeline bypass routes no longer safe.

dailyRows.primary: NOWRUZ DAY 1 — BESSENT 140M BARRELS + NETANYAHU 'IRAN DESTROYED' + TEHRAN STRUCK: Israel hit Tehran on Nowruz. Kuwait Al-Ahmadi refinery fire (KPC confirmed). Saudi 15 drones intercepted. UAE 7 missiles + 15 drones. BESSENT: US may unsanction 140M barrels Iranian oil at sea. Mojtaba absent since Mar 8.
dailyRows.capability: D21: 40+72. NETANYAHU claims Iran capability destroyed — directly contradicted by ongoing launches AND IAEA. IRGC desertions at unit level but institutional level disputed.
dailyRows.cost: Brent dropped ~$110 (from $119 intraday D20). BESSENT intervention: 140M barrels. G7 SPR 400M barrels. Saudi (WSJ): $180/b if disruptions last through April. 1,000 tankers stranded at Hormuz.
dailyRows.assessment: NOWRUZ INFLECTION + SUPPLY-SIDE WAR BEGINS. Bessent weaponizing oil supply. Netanyahu claiming victory for political off-ramp. IRGC still fighting but fracturing.

dailyRows.primary: TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM + DIMONA/ARAD + DIEGO GARCIA + NATANZ: Trump: 'obliterate' power plants if Hormuz not reopened 48 hrs. Iran struck Dimona + Arad — interceptors FAILED — 100+ wounded. Diego Garcia 2 IRBMs (4,000 km). Saudi 38 drones in 3 hrs. IDF fresh Tehran strikes.
dailyRows.capability: D22: 40+75. DIMONA/ARAD = most impactful Israel strike since D1. Interceptors FAILED. Diego Garcia = 4,000 km IRBM. ~40 officials killed. IDF Chief Zamir: 'HALFWAY.'
dailyRows.cost: Brent $112.19 Friday close (highest of war). TRUMP 48-HR ULTIMATUM = most dangerous escalation since D1. Saudi expels military attache. 22-country Hormuz coalition. IEA Birol: 'greatest energy threat in history.'
dailyRows.assessment: FOUR ESCALATIONS COLLIDE: (1) Trump ultimatum vs Iran counter-threat = most dangerous exchange. (2) Dimona/Arad = nuclear tit-for-tat. (3) Diego Garcia = global reach. (4) Saudi expulsion. IDF Zamir: 'HALFWAY' = long war.

dailyRows.primary: 48-HR COUNTDOWN + IDF 200+ TARGETS + IRGC 3RD JET CLAIM: IDF 'wide-scale' strikes (200+ targets, weapons compounds). IRGC: F-16 shot down (3rd fighter jet) + drone intercepted over Tehran. Saudi: 3 ballistic Riyadh + ~60 drones. UAE: 4 ballistic + 25 drones. Iran UN rep: Hormuz 'open to all except enemies.'
dailyRows.capability: D23: 35+70. IRGC claims 200+ coalition aircraft destroyed in 3 weeks. Israel DM Katz: strikes 'INCREASE SIGNIFICANTLY.' Mojtaba absent Day 14.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $112 (weekend). 48-hr deadline approaching. Internet Day 23 = longest in Iran history. Lebanon 1,024+. Iran 1,444+ (AJ).
dailyRows.assessment: THE WAIT: War in holding pattern defined by Trump's 48-hr deadline. IDF intensifying not pausing. Iran UN 'open except enemies' = first selective Hormuz framework = potential off-ramp.

dailyRows.primary: TRUMP BLINKS — POSTPONES 5 DAYS + OIL CRASH: Trump called off ultimatum citing 'productive talks.' CBS: FM confirms 'received points through mediators.' UAE 7 ballistic + 16 drones (cumul 352/15/1,789). Saudi 2 ballistic Riyadh + ~20 drones. IRGC attacked 5th Fleet. Zolghadr new SNSC secretary.
dailyRows.capability: D24: 30+55. UAE cumul 352 ballistic + 15 cruise + 1,789 drones. IRGC maintaining multi-theater despite talks claim. Israel 92% ballistic interception.
dailyRows.cost: Brent CRASHED $112 to $96.50 (~14%). WTI below $90. Dow surged 1,076 pts. Goldman: $110 avg. 5-day deadline = Friday Mar 28.
dailyRows.assessment: TRUMP BLINKS: 48-hr ultimatum resolved as OPTION B (backs down). Credibility damaged. But off-ramp creates space. Iran dual posture: deny publicly, engage privately. Zolghadr = regime continuity.

dailyRows.primary: LEBANON EXPELS IRAN ENVOY + TEL AVIV UNINTERCEPTED + MINES IN HORMUZ: Lebanon declared Iranian ambassador persona non grata. Tel Aviv UNINTERCEPTED missile (~220 lb). Maham 3/7 mines confirmed in Hormuz. Saudi ~20 drones. Kuwait intercepting, 7 power lines. IDF struck al-Dalafa Bridge Litani.
dailyRows.capability: D25: 25+50. TEL AVIV UNINTERCEPTED = critical defense gap. MINES = physical blockade. Hezbollah 865 attack waves. Iran planning Tel Aviv + allies (Fars).
dailyRows.cost: Brent REBOUNDED above $100 — $101.21 (CNBC). Fortune AM $102.47. Goldman: $110 avg; $147 worst case. IEA: 'worse than 73+79.' HRANA: 1,704+ killed. Hospitals 1/3. Internet 552+.
dailyRows.assessment: DIVERGENT SIGNALS: Lebanon expulsion = proxy fracturing. Tel Aviv unintercepted = Iran still dangerous. Mines = Hormuz slow to reopen. Trump 5-day window. Oil rebound = premature optimism corrected.

dailyRows.primary: 15-POINT PEACE PLAN + SAFE PASSAGE FORMAL + 82ND AIRBORNE: Trump admin sent 15-point ceasefire plan via Pakistan (NYT). Iran told UNSC: non-hostile ships can transit with 'prior coordination.' Pakistan Aframax = first non-Iranian transit. 82nd Airborne deploying (2,000-3,000) for Kharg Island. David's Sling MALFUNCTION — 2 ballistic struck southern Israel. Saudi 32 drones + 1 ballistic in 11 hrs. Kuwait airport fuel tank fire. Bahrain: Moroccan civilian killed.
dailyRows.capability: D26: 20+55. SAFE PASSAGE = Iran creating bilateral Hormuz framework. Pakistan tanker transited = physical proof. India traded 3 Iranian tankers for passage. China in talks. IRGC still launching: Saudi 32 drones 11 hrs = sustained. David's Sling malfunction = 2nd interceptor failure in 2 days. 82nd Airborne + 2 MEUs = 6,000-8,000 ground troops = credible Kharg Island threat.
dailyRows.cost: Brent fell ~$99 on peace plan hopes (Fortune $99.75, Investing.com $98.57). WTI ~$89. Iran Health Ministry: 1,500+ killed, 18,551 injured. 82,000+ structures damaged (Red Crescent). Lebanon: 1,072 killed. IDF authorized 400,000 reservist mobilization. Philippines state of emergency. Japan 30-day reserves. China gas +20%. G7 FM Friday.
dailyRows.assessment: D26 — DUAL-TRACK INFLECTION: 15-point plan = most concrete proposal since D1. Safe passage formal = Hormuz de-escalation signal. 82nd Airborne = ground threat. Iran mocks publicly but engages through intermediaries. David's Sling malfunction. Oil fell on hope.

dailyRows.primary: TANGSIRI KILLED + KHARG FORTIFIED + 7 SALVOS + WH DENIES REJECTION: Israel killed IRGC Navy Commander Tangsiri in Bandar Abbas. Iran fortifying Kharg Island (mines/traps/air defenses — CNN). 7 missile salvos at Israel (first Jerusalem-area sirens, 11 injured). CENTCOM: 2/3 arms mfg destroyed. Iran FM rejected plan but WH Leavitt: 'rejection reports FALSE.' Ghalibaf: attacks if islands occupied. Tasnim: Red Sea front threat.
dailyRows.capability: D27: 25+45. TANGSIRI = most significant naval decapitation. CENTCOM: 2/3 arms mfg destroyed = massive industrial damage. BUT Iran STILL launching 7 salvos/day + fortifying Kharg with mines/traps = preparing for ground war phase. Iran's counter-escalation posture: if you come to our islands, we attack your Gulf allies' infrastructure + open Red Sea front. Safe passage expanding despite Tangsiri death = institutional.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $106.12 (+3.8%). Gas $3.981 (first drop). Iran 1,937 killed (AJ). Gulf 25+. UAE 11 dead, 357 ballistic + 1,815 drones cumul. Pew 59% wrong. Ghalibaf + Tasnim threats = Iran deterring Gulf cooperation. GCC 6-country condemnation. WH/Iran contradictory messaging on rejection.
dailyRows.assessment: D27 — FOUR COLLIDING DYNAMICS: (1) TANGSIRI KILLED + Kharg fortified = Iran losing commanders but preparing ground defense. (2) CENTCOM 2/3 destroyed + IDF fait accompli = industrial base being eliminated. (3) WH denies rejection while Iran says 'no negotiations' = contradictory messaging for domestic audiences. (4) Kharg mines/traps + Ghalibaf threat + Tasnim Red Sea = Iran preparing deterrence against ground ops.

dailyRows.primary: ARAK REACTOR + STEEL FACTORIES + PSAB ATTACK: IDF struck Arak heavy water reactor (Khondab) + Yazd uranium processing + Khuzestan Steel + Mobarakeh Steel (IRGC-linked, billions). 50+ IAF jets. Iran hit PSAB: 6 ballistic + 29 drones, 10-15 US troops wounded (2-5 serious), refueling aircraft destroyed + E-3 AWACS damaged. Iran released satellite photos. Trump confirmed April 6 deadline. IRGC vowed corporate retaliation.
dailyRows.capability: D28: 30+55. NUCLEAR ESCALATION — Arak = plutonium production. Yazd = uranium feedstock. Combined with Natanz/Isfahan/Fordow previous strikes = comprehensive nuclear infrastructure targeting. Steel factories = IRGC economic base. Iran STILL launching effectively: PSAB attack = most significant hit on US assets since D12 KC-135 crash.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$108. US total: 13 KIA, ~300 wounded. 162nd Division to S. Lebanon. 2 killed Beirut. Iran: 'no radiation leak.' IRGC threatened industrial companies with American shareholders. Pakistan hosting FM meeting (Turkey, Egypt, Saudi Arabia).
dailyRows.assessment: D28 — NUCLEAR + CORPORATE TARGETING: Israel destroying Iran's nuclear infrastructure AND economic base simultaneously. Iran responding with precision strikes on US military assets + threatening corporate targets = new escalation dimension. April 6 deadline creates 9-day window.

dailyRows.primary: HOUTHIS ENTER WAR + ONE MONTH MARK: Houthis fired ballistic missiles at Israel from Yemen — FIRST since war began. Sirens Beersheba. IDF intercepted. Houthis considering closing Bab al-Mandab. UAE: 20 ballistic + 37 drones (6 injured). Kuwait airport radar significantly damaged. Bahrain fire. Oman port 2 UAVs. G7 joint statement on civilians + Hormuz.
dailyRows.capability: D29: 30+55. HOUTHI ENTRY = war's most significant strategic escalation. Opens THIRD front (Hormuz + Lebanon + now Red Sea). If Bab al-Mandab closes: 1/5 global oil + 1/8 global trade blocked simultaneously. UAE cumul ~377 ballistic + ~1,852 drones. CENTCOM: launches down 90% from D1 but new launch axis from Yemen changes calculus entirely.
dailyRows.cost: Brent $112.57 (+4.22%) — highest since Jul 2022. WTI $99.64 (briefly $100). +51% in one month. Lebanon 1,142 killed. 330,000+ displaced (UN). G7: 'immediate cessation.' Pakistan FM meeting. Trump: 'not finished, thousands of targets.' Rubio: 'ahead of schedule.'
dailyRows.assessment: D29 — ONE MONTH + HOUTHI ENTRY: War EXPANDING not contracting at one-month mark. Houthi entry threatens second chokepoint. Oil surging. Casualties mounting. G7/international pressure building. Trump April 6 deadline = 9 days to produce results. Contradiction: 'ahead of schedule' vs 'thousands of targets left' vs Houthi entry = no coherent endgame strategy visible.

dailyRows.primary: D30 — HOUTHIS RESUME + PAKISTAN DIPLOMACY: Iran warned against ground invasion. Pakistan hosted FM meeting. Houthis 2nd operation at Israel. UAE 16 ballistic + 42 drones. Kuwait 14+12. Saudi 10 drones. Al Arabiya cumul: 550 ballistic + 300 drones at Israel, 1,119 missiles + 3,792 drones at Gulf.
dailyRows.capability: D30: 35+65. Houthi sustained. UAE cumul ~393+1,894. CENTCOM: 25-35/day stabilizing. Ghalibaf warns ground invasion.
dailyRows.cost: Brent ~$108.50. Gas >$4. Internet ~700+ hrs. Iraq PMF in Iran. 4,700+ security forces killed (Iran Intl).
dailyRows.assessment: D30 — STALEMATE: Low-intensity multi-theater harassment + diplomacy. Pakistan primary intermediary. Houthi sustained = permanent front.

dailyRows.primary: D31 — B-52 OVER IRAN + TOTAL DESTRUCTION THREAT: First B-52 flights over Iran — struck Isfahan ammo depot + air base. Trump: destroy ALL power plants, oil wells, Kharg, desalination if no deal. Turkey/NATO 4th missile intercept. Iran denied (false flag claim). UAE 11+27.

publishingDeepDive: PAPER/INK SUPPLY: Iran imports 70%+ of printing paper. Hormuz closure + sanctions = supply chain severed. Domestic paper mills operating at estimated 20-30% capacity due to power disruptions. Quality declining.

PRINTING CAPACITY: Tehran's major printing houses (Offset, Sepehr, etc.) operating intermittently due to power outages. 768+ hour internet blackout prevents digital prepress. Estimated 80-90% capacity reduction.

DISTRIBUTION NETWORKS: Domestic book distribution (Shahre Ketab, Book City, etc.) severely disrupted. 82,000+ structures damaged. Physical bookstores in strike zones closed. Online ordering impossible without internet.

CENSORSHIP APPARATUS: Ministry of Culture and Islamic Guidance (Ershad) presumably still operating but capacity unknown. Book permits may be delayed or suspended. Paradoxically, war may reduce censorship bandwidth.

PUBLISHER SOLVENCY: Small and medium publishers facing existential crisis. No sales, no distribution, no printing capacity. University presses better positioned (institutional backing) but still severely impacted. Expect consolidation/closures post-war.

DIGITAL ALTERNATIVES: Iran's digital book ecosystem (Taaghche, Fidibo) non-functional during internet blackout. Post-restoration, digital may recover faster than print. However, academic institutions require physical copies for cataloging and archival.
publishingDeepDive_fa: کاغذ و مرکب: ایران ۷۰٪+ کاغذ چاپ وارد می‌کند. هرمز + تحریم = زنجیره قطع. کارخانه‌ها ۲۰-۳۰٪ ظرفیت.

توزیع: شبکه (شهر کتاب و غیره) مختل. ۸۲,۰۰۰+ ساختمان آسیب. فروشگاه‌ها بسته. سفارش آنلاین ناممکن.

strandedCargo.detail: Most cargo insured under pre-war marine policies. Claims processing delayed — Lloyd's overwhelmed. Perishables (~15% by value) written off. Non-perishable goods safe in bonded storage but incurring daily storage fees (~$150/container/day).
strandedCargo.detail_fa: اکثر بار بیمه. پردازش خسارت تأخیر. فاسدشدنی (~۱۵٪) از دست رفته. غیرفاسدشدنی در انبار اما هزینه روزانه (~$۱۵۰/کانتینر/روز).

insuranceCostIndex.note: D36: MSC Ishyka (Israel-linked) attacked by IRGC drone in Hormuz — on fire. Bushehr NPP 4th hit. Mahshahr petrochemical struck. Hull 13.5% = UNINSURABLE. War risk 5.2% = highest since 1980s tanker war. IRGC selectively targeting = ship-specific risk assessment required.

dealAvailability.reasoning: Iran formally rejected 15-point plan AND ceasefire request. Kharazi (back-channel) struck. China 5-point plan exists but lacks enforcement. No proposal with mutual face-saving elements. Score: very low.
dealAvailability.reasoning_fa: ایران طرح ۱۵ بند و آتش‌بس را رد کرد. خرازی زخمی. طرح ۵ بند چین بدون اجرا. هیچ طرحی با حفظ آبرو دوطرفه نیست.

usExitPressure.reasoning: Pew 59% wrong. 15 KIA, 520+ wounded, 7 aircraft. Gas $4.10 (+37%). Day 37 with no exit. BUT Trump wants 'victory' not 'withdrawal' — exit narrative unavailable. April 6 self-imposed deadline = trap.
usExitPressure.reasoning_fa: پیو ۵۹٪ اشتباه. ۱۵ کشته، ۵۲۰+ زخمی. بنزین $۴.۱۰. روز ۳۷ بدون خروج. اما ترامپ 'پیروزی' نه 'عقب‌نشینی'. مهلت ۶ آوریل = تله.

iranAcceptance.reasoning: Iran has strong leverage: Hormuz toll working, Houthis active, missile stockpile (half launchers intact per Haaretz/CNN). IRGC formally rejected ceasefire. Regime surviving despite decapitation. Iran calculates US political cost rising faster than Iran's military cost. No incentive to accept current terms.
iranAcceptance.reasoning_fa: ایران اهرم قوی: عوارض هرمز، حوثی فعال، نصف پرتاب‌ها سالم. سپاه آتش‌بس رد. رژیم پابرجا. ایران محاسبه: هزینه سیاسی آمریکا سریع‌تر بالا.

escalationProximity.reasoning: Power grid deadline TOMORROW (0.95). 5/6 nuclear facilities struck (0.83). Houthis threatening Bab al-Mandab (0.6). 82nd Airborne deployed + Kharg fortified (0.5). Nearest ceiling = power grid at 0.95 = nearly certain if no deal.
escalationProximity.reasoning_fa: نیروگاه فردا (۰.۹۵). ۵/۶ تأسیسات هسته‌ای (۰.۸۳). حوثی باب‌المندب (۰.۶). هوابرد ۸۲ مستقر (۰.۵).

outcomeProbabilities.derivation_negotiated: P(deal) × P(US_exit) × P(Iran_accept) = 0.15 × 0.55 × 0.10 = 0.008. Adjusted up to 0.08 to account for coerced deal (April 6 threat forcing Iran's hand).
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_escalation: P(escalation_proximity) × (1 - P(deal)) = 0.75 × (1 - 0.15) = 0.64. Adjusted down to 0.40 because Trump has blinked on 2 prior deadlines.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_protracted: 1 - P(resolution) - P(catastrophe) - P(intervention) = residual. War continues at current intensity for weeks.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_intervention: G7 statements + UN pressure + China plan, but no enforcement mechanism. Low but rising.
outcomeProbabilities.derivation_other: Regime fracture, internal coup, unexpected event.

calibration.polymarketSource: Polymarket 'Iran ceasefire by April 30' contract (estimated from similar markets)

historicalBaseRate.methodology: Of ~40 post-WWII asymmetric Middle East conflicts, ~35% resolved within 45 days (current D37). Base rate prior.

oilFuturesSignal.interpretation: Spot > futures = market expects crisis is TEMPORARY. Consistent with resolution within months, not years.

calibration.modelVsMarket: Model: 8% negotiated resolution. Market: ~12%. Difference suggests model may be slightly too pessimistic on deal probability, or market hasn't priced in Iran's formal rejection.

confidence.methodology: Ensemble: model-derived (8%) + market signal (12%) + historical base rate (35%) → weighted average 18%. Range reflects model disagreement.

trumpPattern.methodology: Bayesian: prior P(follow-through) = 0.70 (typical for presidential threats). 2 observed blinks → likelihood ratio 0.3^2 = 0.09. Posterior = 0.70 * 0.09 / (0.70*0.09 + 0.30*0.7) = ~0.23. Rounded to 0.30 accounting for escalation momentum.

sensitivity.input: If a credible deal proposal emerges

sensitivity.input: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate
sensitivity.interpretation: If Iran signals willingness to negotiate (e.g., Hormuz opening offer), probability triples. This is the binding constraint.

Escalation doesn't increase resolution — it changes the TYPE of resolution (forced vs negotiated). Impact on probability is indirect.

sensitivity.interpretation: Whether Trump strikes power grid doesn't affect negotiated resolution — it affects escalation vs continuation. Different outcome, same low deal probability.
